_comment: Full `pytest tests/` GREEN floor for the ratchet guardrail (checks.py::check_suite_baseline). Failures may only ratchet DOWN, passes only UP — any new failure is a collateral regression and fails the sprint before the Evaluator. Advance this file ONLY in a human-promoted commit that legitimately changes the counts (the ratchet reads it at HEAD, never the worktree, so a sprint cannot lower its own bar).
commit: v5.24.0 — floor re-derived to real green count (was stale at 4118 since 178798d); +48 from H22 Phase-0 gaps, the rest interim K-track tests; human-promoted release
